feedback_files.tests/test_feedback_atomic_failure.py:
import pytest

from payments.journal import Journal, JournalWriteError
from payments.service import TransferService
from payments.wallet_store import InsufficientFunds, WalletStore


def wallets_with_pair():
    wallets = WalletStore()
    wallets.create("payer", 500)
    wallets.create("payee", 40)
    return wallets


def test_wallet_atomic_scope_restores_nested_balances():
    wallets = wallets_with_pair()
    with pytest.raises(RuntimeError):
        with wallets.atomic():
            wallets.move("payer", "payee", 125)
            raise RuntimeError("abort unit of work")
    assert (wallets.balance("payer"), wallets.balance("payee")) == (500, 40)


def test_journal_adapter_failure_does_not_publish_half_a_transfer():
    journal = Journal()
    journal.fail_once_for.add("journal-44")
    with pytest.raises(JournalWriteError):
        journal.record_transfer("journal-44", "payer", "payee", 70)
    assert journal.entries_for("journal-44") == []


def test_failed_request_can_retry_with_the_same_identity():
    wallets = wallets_with_pair()
    journal = Journal()
    journal.fail_once_for.add("retry-44")
    service = TransferService(wallets, journal)
    with pytest.raises(JournalWriteError):
        service.transfer("retry-44", "payer", "payee", 70)

    assert (wallets.balance("payer"), wallets.balance("payee")) == (500, 40)
    assert journal.entries_for("retry-44") == []
    result = service.transfer("retry-44", "payer", "payee", 70)
    assert result["status"] == "committed"
    assert (wallets.balance("payer"), wallets.balance("payee")) == (430, 110)
    assert [entry["delta"] for entry in journal.entries_for("retry-44")] == [-70, 70]


def test_insufficient_request_identity_is_not_consumed():
    wallets = wallets_with_pair()
    journal = Journal()
    service = TransferService(wallets, journal)
    with pytest.raises(InsufficientFunds):
        service.transfer("fund-later", "payer", "payee", 650)
    wallets.deposit("payer", 200)
    result = service.transfer("fund-later", "payer", "payee", 650)
    assert result["status"] == "committed"
    assert (wallets.balance("payer"), wallets.balance("payee")) == (50, 690)
